rules.description: Comparable located materially farther from subject than typical for the market (>1 mile default)
rules.citation: MI/Arch checklist: comparable distance vs. subject location

rules.description: Comp sale is stale relative to effective date

logic.source_logic: Flag if comp settlement/contract date is more than 12 months before AppraisalEffectiveDate

rules.citation: MI checklist: 'Did any of the comparables sell more than 12 months prior to the effective date?'

rules.description: All comparables selected are materially superior or inferior to subject (one-directional bias)

logic.source_logic: Flag if ComparableToSubjectDirectionType is the same direction (all 'Superior' or all 'Inferior') across every comp on a given characteristic line

rules.citation: MGIC training: 'Property value may be inflated when all comparables are significantly superior or inferior to the subject.'

rules.description: Fewer than 3 closed sales comparables reported without an explanation
rules.citation: Fannie Mae B4-1.3-08/09: minimum comparable sufficiency to support value

rules.description: Comp weighting inconsistent with adjustment magnitude

logic.source_logic: Flag if ComparableWeightType marks a comp as most heavily weighted while it also carries the largest SalePriceNetTotalAdjustmentAmount among the set

rules.citation: CU FNM1011: 'CU indicates heightened overvaluation risk may result from the appraiser's weighting of adjusted sale prices.'

rules.description: Comp property type mismatch with subject use type

logic.source_logic: Flag if a Sales Comparable's improvement/property type materially differs from Subject's (e.g. subject SFR, comp is a PUD/condo) without adjustment

rules.citation: Fannie Mae B4-1.3-08: comparable sales should have similar physical and legal characteristics

rules.description: Rental comparable count insufficient for GRM support

logic.source_logic: Flag if Income Approach is used (GrossRentMultiplierFactor populated) but fewer than 3 rental/GRM comparables reported

rules.citation: Standard income-approach sufficiency practice, mirrors sales-comparison minimum-comp guidance

rules.description: Subject property ZIP code format invalid (must be 5-digit or 5+4)
rules.citation: UAD Specification Section 2.1

rules.description: Subject Gross Living Area missing or zero
rules.citation: UAD Appendix B: GLA is required (R)

rules.description: Appraiser license/certification number missing
rules.citation: UAD Appendix B: Appraiser License Identifier is required (R)

rules.description: Appraised value missing or zero
rules.citation: UAD Appendix B: PropertyAppraisedValueAmount is required (R)

rules.description: Effective date of appraisal missing
rules.citation: UAD Appendix B: AppraisalEffectiveDate is required (R)

rules.description: Sales comparison approach indicated value missing when sales comparison used
rules.citation: UAD Appendix B: ValueIndicatedBySalesComparisonApproachAmount required when approach used

rules.description: Reconciliation summary comment missing
rules.citation: USPAP Standards Rule 2-2(a): reconciliation required

rules.description: Comp 1 net adjustment exceeds 10% of sale price (CU overvaluation signal)
rules.citation: CU FNM1011: net adjustment > 10% indicates potential overvaluation

rules.description: Comp 1 gross adjustment exceeds 25% of sale price
rules.citation: Standard practice: gross adjustment > 25% suggests comparability concerns

rules.description: Comp 1 GLA adjustment missing when subject and comp GLA differ materially

logic.source_logic: Flag if subject GLA and comp GLA differ by > 100 sq ft but no SALE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT with _Type='GrossLivingArea' exists

rules.citation: Fannie Mae B4-1.3-08: adjustments required for material differences

rules.description: Delivery photo too dark to evaluate
rules.citation: Fannie Mae B4-1.2-01: photos must be clear and evaluable

rules.description: Delivery photo too blurry to evaluate
rules.citation: Fannie Mae B4-1.2-01: photos must be clear and evaluable

rules.description: Face detected in delivery photo -- potential PII exposure
rules.citation: GLBA/PII protection: appraiser should redact faces before delivery
